implementation_summary.summary: CP00-868 bridges the RP28 Marketplace descriptor-only evidence-review permission/audit rows across RP28.P08.M04.S13-RP28.P08.M06.S08 without executing review harnesses, Hermes runtime receipts, permission decisions, audit writes, product-state writes, or using real client data.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-868 RP28.P08.M04.S13-RP28.P08.M06.S08 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
